task: Left sidebar navigation, real-time chat via SSE, and documents tab for the Binayah Ultimate gamification dashboard. Left sidebar replaces top-bar pipeline nav: permanent nav (pipelines, Documents, Activity, Chat). Real-time chat: SSE streaming endpoint pushes new messages without polling. Documents tab: S3-backed file upload with MongoDB metadata, tagged to pipelines.

devReport.summary: Implemented left sidebar nav (4 items, pipeline sub-list, t.* tokens), SSE real-time chat (NodeJS runtime, EventEmitter bus, 30s keep-alive, ?since= gap-fill, exponential backoff reconnect), and Notion-style Documents (TipTap StarterKit, BinayahDocument Mongoose model, CRUD API routes, DocumentsPanel with 2-column layout, inline-editable title, save indicator, pipeline filter pills). Mobile: sidebar hidden, Documents accessible via 📄 header button + BottomSheet. Build passes, tsc passes.

designBrief.direction: Command-center utilitarian in the Linear/Vercel register — tight iconography, monospace labels, accent-on-active, silence speaks
designBrief.hero: Permanent left rail: t.bgSoft surface, t.border right edge, 4 nav items with accent left-border + accent+22 bg when active, textMuted inactive with text+bgHover on hover. Pipeline sub-list scrolls inline below nav.
designBrief.cards: Documents panel: 280px list column with pipeline filter pills (accent+22 active bg matching SearchFilter pattern) + full-height TipTap editor column. List items show title, pipeline tag pill (colorFromKey), AvatarC 16px, relative time. Active item: accent left-border + bgHover.
designBrief.interactions: SSE connection dot in chat header (green=live, amber=reconnecting). Reconnecting indicator in textMuted mono. Incoming messages fade in 150ms. Save indicator text cycles: idle → '// saving...' (textMuted) → '// saved' (green, 2.5s) → idle.
designBrief.copy: Tactical, lowercase, code-voice: '// no docs yet — forge one', '// select a doc or create one', '// saving...', '// saved', '// reconnecting...'
designBrief.benchmark: Linear's left rail compactness + Notion's list-editor split + Slack's message arrival animation

reviewerReport.summary: SSE race fix correct, type guard complete

summary: Stage 1/1: left sidebar nav (desktop) + SSE team chat (Node runtime, EventEmitter bus, 30s keep-alive, last-id gap-fill) + Notion-style Documents (TipTap + Mongoose model + CRUD API). Mobile nav pattern preserved.
plannerAnswers: Documents should be Notion-style (rich text documents, not file uploads — think pages with text, headings, maybe embeds). For everything else use the defaults you recommended.

loopContext.designRouteReason: plannerOutput is already a dense design brief with specific IA, empty-state copy voice, and component patterns — routing to designer would redo that work. DEV-direct saves a designer loop while the spec encodes intent (what each surface must achieve + which design principles apply) rather than pixels.

contextGaps.missing: After ship: add src/lib/chatBus.ts (EventEmitter singleton pattern for in-process SSE pub/sub), src/lib/BinayahDocument.ts (Mongoose model for Notion-style docs), src/components/LeftSidebar.tsx + DocumentsPanel.tsx. Note the 'separate collection bypasses patchState whitelist' gotcha for Documents.

After ship: note SSE requires Node.js runtime (Edge has no Mongoose / no long-lived EventEmitter); EventSource must use cookie-based auth (cannot send custom headers); ReadableStream keep-alive pattern every 30s to prevent proxy timeouts.
